nodes.label: Narriv.

nodes.label: Stylized connected N route mark
nodes.description: Abstract monogram-like symbol resembling an N, connected path, route, waveform, or journey mark; exact intended reading AMBIGUOUS.

nodes.label: Navigation or route
nodes.description: The connected curved strokes and dot endpoints suggest movement, routing, travel, or pathfinding; interpretation AMBIGUOUS.

nodes.label: Connectivity
nodes.description: Intersecting strokes and dots imply linked points, network connection, or flow.

nodes.label: Blue and cyan gradient palette
nodes.description: Logo symbol uses bright blue, cyan, and darker blue overlap accents.

nodes.label: Dark navy wordmark color
nodes.description: Brand text is rendered in a very dark navy or indigo color.

nodes.label: Circular dot elements
nodes.description: Several circular dots appear around and within the symbol, acting as endpoints or markers.

hyperedges.description: Narriv brand identity combines a dark navy wordmark with a blue/cyan abstract connected route-like symbol.
